data.title: Forward Industries retraces price boost from Galaxy, Jump Crypto-backed DeFi moves
data.description:
Forward Industries, Inc. , a Nasdaq-listed company that took a dramatic strategic shift when it launched its Solana (SOL)-centric digital asset treasury strategy, has announced new products as part of its new DeFi venture. The strategy involved raising $1. 65 billion through a private investment in public equity (PIPE) deal, led by crypto heavyweights Galaxy Digital, Jump […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/forward-industries-retraces-price-boost/

data.title: DOJ Seizes Burma Crypto Scam Domain After Victims Lost Millions in Fake Trading Scheme
data.description:
U. S. authorities have seized the Burmese domain tickmilleas. com, a fraudulent trading site posing as a legitimate crypto platform with fake dashboards and returns to trick victims into sending real money.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/tai-chang-burma-domain-seized-by-us-doj/

data.title: Quantitative Yield Protocol Axis Secures $5 Million Private Round Led by Galaxy Ventures
data.description:
The fundraising also attracted participation from FalconX, OKX Ventures, CMT Digital, Maven 11, GSR, CMS Holdings, and Marc Zeller of the Aave Chan Initiative, among others.
source: https://www.nftgators.com/quantitative-yield-protocol-axis-secures-5-million-private-round-led-by-galaxy-ventures/

data.title: PAXG Transfer from Null Address to Paxos Recorded
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, Arkham data indicates that at 02:42, a total of 1200.69 PAXG was transferred from a Null Address to Paxos.

data.title: Ripple CEO issues harsh warning on online scams this Christmas
data.description:
Ripple CEO warns against falling prey to crypto scams during Christmas.
source: https://www.thestreet.com/crypto/markets/ripple-ceo-issues-harsh-warning-on-online-scams-this-christmas

data.title: Former SEC Chair Gensler Warns All Cryptos Are Risky — Except Bitcoin
data.description:
Former SEC Chairman Gary Gensler cautioned that cryptocurrencies beyond Bitcoin lack fundamental backing, while Vanguard's dramatic policy reversal granted 50 million clients access to spot crypto ETFs, triggering $1 billion in immediate trading volume.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/former-sec-chair-gensler-warns-all-cryptos-are-risky-except-bitcoin/

data.title: Bitcoin Rebounds Above $92K as Fear Eases and SUI, LINK, 2Z Surge
data.description:
Altcoin Season has stayed constrained while Bitcoin has rebounded above $92,000 and the fear index has improved to 22, as Sui, Chainlink and DoubleZero have posted double-digit gains on new access, steady utility and rotation into mid cap tokens.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/altcoin-season-gasps-as-sui-link-and-2z-push-higher/

data.title: Polymarket Begins U.S. Launch for Waitlisted Users
data.description:
Polymarket rolls out U. S. access to waitlisted users after acquiring a licensed exchange and securing CFTC clearance, starting with sports markets.
source: https://www.bankless.com/read/news/polymarket-begins-u-s-launch-for-waitlisted-users

data.title: SEC sends warning letters to ETF issuers targeting untamed leverage
data.description:
The United States Securities and Exchange Commission halted several ETF filings that proposed 3-5 times leverage on the underlying asset.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/sec-warning-letters-etf-untamed-leverage?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Revolut adds support for Solana’s network
data.description:
Revolut added full support for the Solana network, adding SOL for transfers, as well as withdrawals. Previously, SOL was only available for in-app trading.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/revolut-adds-support-for-solanas-network/

data.title: WhiteBIT’s WBT token included in 5 S&P Dow Jones crypto indices
data.description:
WhiteBIT’s native crypto coin WBT has been added to S&P Dow Jones crypto indices after meeting institutional standards set by the US stock and crypto market tracker, joining exchanges Coinbase and Robinhood. In a post on X, WhiteBIT CEO Volodymyr Nosov announced on Wednesday that WBT is featured in five S&P Dow Jones benchmark families […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/whitebits-wbt-token-included-in-sp-dow-jones/

data.title: PayPal’s PYUSD Rockets Into Top Stablecoin Spots
data.description:
Key Takeaways: PYUSD’s market cap has tripled to $3. 8B in months. PayPal’s ecosystem and DeFi support are fueling its rise.
source: https://coindoo.com/paypals-pyusd-rockets-into-top-stablecoin-spots/
